headlines.title: Zelensky criticises 'vile' Chornobyl drone strike ahead of London talks
headlines.summary: Ukrainian officials say a Russian drone hit a storage facility for spent nuclear fuel near the Chornobyl nuclear plant.

headlines.title: Steve Rosenberg: Russia's economic forum overshadowed by drone attacks on St Petersburg
headlines.summary: The BBC's Russia editor saw Putin's flagship economic event overshadowed by Ukrainian drones attacks.

headlines.title: 'It was either killed or be killed' - ongoing nightmares of an ex-child soldier in Somalia
headlines.summary: Yusuf Ali, now 34, struggles with his memories living in Mogadishu surrounded by dark reminders of his past.

headlines.title: Insecurity and instability drive voters in Peru's tight presidential race
headlines.summary: After eight presidents in 10 years, many voters are looking for stability so the next president can focus on tackling crime and inequality.

headlines.title: Armenia votes as Russia piles pressure on pro-West government
headlines.summary: Incumbent Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan is seeking a third term despite falling domestic support.

headlines.title: Hegseth attacks Europe over migration with beach 'invasion' D-Day speech
headlines.summary: The US defence secretary was speaking in Normandy, 82 years after allied forces launched their operation to liberate Nazi-occupied north-western Europe.

headlines.title: Huge crowds throng Madrid streets for Pope's open-air Mass
headlines.summary: The pontiff waved at those gathered from his popemobile as he arrived at the Plaza de Cibeles.

headlines.title: Pope Leo urges global leaders to stop dividing electorates with 'sterile simplifications'
headlines.summary: Pope Leo on Saturday urged global leaders to stop dividing their electorates, calling on them to listen to the world's cries for peace as he met migrants and some 600,000 young people.

headlines.title: Hegseth invokes immigration and 'invasion' in D-Day speech in France
headlines.summary: US Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth delivered a controversial speech in Normandy referencing immigration and 'invasion' on the anniversary of D-Day.

headlines.title: Jamaica scrambles to restore power after rare islandwide blackout
headlines.summary: Jamaica is working to restore electricity after a rare islandwide power outage affected the entire country.

headlines.title: Spearfisher killed in Australia's third fatal shark attack in 4 weeks
headlines.summary: A spearfisher has died in Western Australia, marking the third fatal shark attack in the country in just four weeks.

headlines.title: At least 12 people shot at an Ohio festival and suspects remain at large
headlines.summary: Police are searching for suspects after at least 12 people were shot at a street festival in Toledo, Ohio.
